articles.author: Julie Bort
articles.title: General Catalyst posted VC rage bait and it worked, especially on a16z - TechCrunch
articles.description: Compulsive X user Marc Andreessen himself couldn't resist responding, many, many times.
articles.content:
One of the most entertaining moments in VC this week was a piece of rage-bait marketing from General Catalyst.
In a now-viral post on X that parodies the old Mac vs. PC commercials, the venture firm… [+3035 chars]

articles.author: Beth Mole
articles.title: Ebola outbreak with uncommon strain erupts in Congo and Uganda; 65 deaths - Ars Technica
articles.description: WHO learned of potential cases May 5; US CDC said it just heard about it yesterday.
